summary: Consolidate lead_agency, has_lead_agency, has_lead_entity under canonical lead_agency
rationale: lead_agency (6), has_lead_agency (3), and has_lead_entity (2) all express the same concept of which entity leads a project. Consolidate to lead_agency as the canonical form with highest usage.

summary: Consolidate partner, partner_agency, has_partner under canonical has_partner
rationale: has_partner (6), partner (2), and partner_agency (2) all express partnership relations. Consolidate to has_partner as the canonical form with highest usage.

summary: Consolidate enacted and enacted_by under canonical enacted
rationale: enacted (3) and enacted_by (2) express the same enactment concept. Consolidate to enacted as the canonical form with higher usage.

summary: Consolidate publishes, published_by, releases under canonical publishes
rationale: publishes (3), published_by (3), and releases (5) all express publication/release actions. Consolidate to publishes as the canonical form.

summary: Consolidate operates, operated_by under canonical operates
rationale: operates (4) and operated_by (2) express the same operation relationship from different directions. Consolidate to operates as the canonical form with higher usage.

summary: Consolidate operates_on_corridor, operates_on, uses_corridor under canonical uses_corridor
rationale: uses_corridor (14), operates_on_corridor (9), and operates_on (3) all express spatial corridor relationships. Consolidate to uses_corridor as the canonical form with highest usage.

summary: Consolidate implements, implemented_by under canonical implements
rationale: implements (3) and implemented_by (4) express the same implementation relationship. Consolidate to implements as the canonical form.

summary: Consolidate enforces, enforced_by under canonical enforces
rationale: enforces (1) and enforced_by (2) express the same enforcement relationship. Consolidate to enforces as the canonical form.

summary: Consolidate serves, serves_route under canonical serves_route
rationale: serves_route (82) is the dominant form; serves (6) is a shorter variant of the same concept. Consolidate to serves_route as the canonical form with highest usage.

summary: Consolidate includes_route, covers_route, will_serve_route under canonical includes_route
rationale: includes_route (5), covers_route (3), and will_serve_route (2) all express route coverage relationships. Consolidate to includes_route as the canonical form with highest usage.

summary: Consolidate applies_to, applied_on_corridor under canonical applies_to
rationale: applies_to (2) and applied_on_corridor (2) express the same application relationship. Consolidate to applies_to as the canonical form.

summary: Consolidate part_of, part_of_project, part_of_program under canonical part_of
rationale: part_of (2), part_of_project (2), and part_of_program (1) all express membership/composition. Consolidate to part_of as the canonical form with highest usage.

summary: Consolidate community_outreach, consulted under canonical community_outreach
rationale: community_outreach (2) and consulted (2) express the same outreach/consultation relationship. Consolidate to community_outreach as the canonical form.

summary: Consolidate data_source, data_collection_partner under canonical data_source
rationale: data_source (4) and data_collection_partner (1) express the same data sourcing relationship. Consolidate to data_source as the canonical form with higher usage.

summary: Consolidate complementary_program, complementary_project under canonical complementary_project
rationale: complementary_program (1) and complementary_project (1) express the same complement relationship. Consolidate to complementary_project as the canonical form.

summary: Consolidate located_in, located_on, located_on_corridor under canonical located_in
rationale: located_in (2), located_on (1), and located_on_corridor (1) all express spatial location. Consolidate to located_in as the canonical form with highest usage.

summary: Consolidate includes_corridor, improves_corridor under canonical uses_corridor
rationale: includes_corridor (2) and improves_corridor (2) express project-corridor spatial relationships that are variants of uses_corridor. Consolidate to uses_corridor.
